evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be conclusively validated due to insufficient evidence.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where the group size changes after booking, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete outcomes or results from the simulation. The linked use case indicates that the system allows jobs to exceed the estimated time range, which raises questions about the handling of group size changes. Without clear traces or snapshots to confirm the expected behavior, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of the outcome of the scenario simulation regarding group size changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scenario behavior.
